title: Minimal bug fixes linking epic for parser validation, config consistency, and safety checks
description: Epic linking 5 small self-contained ready bug beads. Fixes add minimal checks/resets/validations per file purpose (regex, Kconfig, protobuf, types, lengths). Parallel explore+claim+fix+test+codereview. Idiomatic, no comments, vector exact, no test mods. Close on clean. Follows AGENTS.md review loop.
notes: Linked bugs: yvey,3h0m,hcd9,9im7,iwa3. Will claim+fix 5 small bugs: Kconfig range, protobuf field validation, regex delimiter, type safety in C, payload len check in Rust. Minimal additions of checks/validations per file intent (config bounds, parser strictness, safety bounds). Parallel with explore on lichen/subsys/lichen/oscore/, lichen/subsys/lichen/meshtastic/, scripts/analyze-hetero-fleet.py, lichen/samples/lora_ping/, rust/lichen-embassy/ + spec/ test/vectors/
